creator: vegeta@tuxpowered.net
text: I came across an issue preventing this from working correctly when rebooting hardware: pfsync is started before pf (or in my case before my custom service populating pf rules. That's a problem, because for route-to interface to be correctly rebuilt, pf rules must be already present. I'm unsure if changing this order is a good idea, maybe it is like this for a good reason?
